markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review client sprint progress and discuss process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New PM System:** A new Notion-based PM system is launching next week to standardize client health scores, action items, and blockers, directly addressing the need for more explicit status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Brex as a Demo:** The Brex project (hub, tools, indexes) will serve as a case study to upsell Ramp on custom services, but the demo won't be ready until mid-March, just before Ramp's March 26 transition.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Check That SOP:** A formal SOP for creating Check That prompts is needed, as clients often lack ideas and a structured process will ensure quality and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**Daylight Upsell:** Daylight requested a proposal for a new event series management service, creating an immediate upsell opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### Process & System Improvements

  - [**Problem:** Inconsistent client status updates (health, conversion) make forecasting difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new Notion-based PM system will launch next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Features:** Standardized client health scores, action items, and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Structure:** A micro-Kanban for tasks will sit under each client's main page.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Handoffs:** Flag any risks (e.g., quality concerns) during handoff to the Growth EMs to ensure accurate forecasting.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Client Updates

  - [**BlackSoul (Converted):**](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [**Status:** Officially converted; handing over this week.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Production:** Last week's articles are in Sydney's queue. Usman takes over production next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Brex (Sprint):**](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

          - [New resources hub](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
          - [Website optimization & custom tools](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
          - [Index & templates play](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Tools ready mid-March; indexes ready \~1 month later.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Strategic Initiatives

  - [**Check That Prompt SOP:** William will create a formal SOP for generating Check That prompts, as clients often need guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**Check That Pricing:** Ella will clarify the Check That pricing model (bundled vs. upsell) by end-of-week.](https://fathom.video/share/SBN1Vg_1MTduDym1_p_zhRW_9y6EiUMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
